title: After the Hakodate Kinen: A Night View Like None Other ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Putting the momentum she's gained from
sightseeing to use, Mejiro Palmer runs well in the
Hakodate Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, it seems that she still doesn't know what
she truly wants to do. In order to find out...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She decides to revisit Hokkaido in the summer
and think about it while having some fun. We set
her next goal as next year's Nikkei Shinshun Hai.
